ideal_must_detect.matched_text: proposed acquisition of Zephyr Port Systems Pte. Ltd

Internal memorandum to Board Audit & Risk Committee of Sunleaf Marine Ltd. from Lexor Tan & Hee LLC dated 28 May 2026 re: proposed acquisition of Zephyr Port Systems Pte. Ltd. (DealRef SL—A  C Q—0 0 9).

For PDPA compliance, cross‑border transfer of diligence packets to the Nimbus HR Sydney instance (employee onboarding forms and contractor rosters) proceeded under DPA Schedule 2; Data Export Approval DEX-1 7 5 was granted on 24 May 2026 with onward‑transfer restrictions.
Retention: CVs and interview notes are to be retained for 6 months post‑close under policy PR-RET-03, after which erasure will occur unless required for legal claims; early erasure may be requested by individuals.
DSAR: one access request from Mr. Jorin Tay dated 23 May 2026 seeking payroll history for FY2024 was fulfilled on 25 May 2026 with redactions of third‑party data; there are no outstanding DSARs as at 28 May 2026.
Consent withdrawal/erasure: Ms. Delia Khoo (finance contractor) withdrew consent for direct marketing on 20 May 2026; her marketing profile was erased and verified on 21 May 2026, while core employment records are retained solely for statutory purposes.
Minimisation: onboarding form FRM‑ONB‑04 has been trimmed to role‑critical fields (ID, bank name, tax residency), removing non‑essential fields (e.g., personal hobbies) effective immediately.
Completed control: Cross‑border Transfer Impact Assessment CTIA—0 4 has been closed; no personal data will be moved to non‑comparable jurisdictions after 25 May 2026 absent fresh approvals.
Security artefacts: share registry extract ref SR-9•••21 has been redacted; internal identifiers appear as EmpRef e7 7-xx-3 9 0; this is a compliance artefact and not a trading signal.
Capital markets timeline: any announcement will be released via SGXNet after clearance; draft text and DPA Schedule 2 are at http://intra.sunleaf.sg/export?ref=M%26A-20 26-A1&doc=Schedule2 (note OCR spacing in the link).
Governance: information barriers are in place; the research desk is ring‑fenced and the deal team is on the Insider List; no MAC clause has been triggered under the current term sheet.
Public references (Exchange index levels, analyst consensus) are sourced from openly available materials and do not contain confidential information.
Contact: queries to Mr. Eamon Yeo, Partner, Lexor Tan & Hee LLC, eamon.yeo@lexor-hee.com
